name: Register login create bug shows it in list
description: A new user registers an account, signs in, creates a bug report, and sees the newly created bug appear in the dashboard bug list.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Click the Register link
Enter a name in the name field
Enter a unique email address in the email field
Enter a password of at least 8 characters in the password field
Click the Register button to submit the registration form
Verify the dashboard page loads showing the bug list and a welcome message with the registered name

name: Filter bugs by status and search by title
description: On the dashboard, a user filters the bug list by status (e.g. Open) and searches for a bug by title text, and the list updates to show only matching bugs.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Sign in with the demo account email demo@bugbox.dev and password demo1234
Verify the dashboard loads with a list of multiple bugs visible
Open the Status filter dropdown and select Open
Click the Apply button to apply the filter
Verify the bug list only shows bugs with the Open status badge, and no bugs with Resolved or Closed status badges appear
Type a partial bug title into the search field
Click the Apply button to apply the search
Verify the bug list narrows to only bugs whose titles contain the search text, and at least one matching bug is visible

name: Open bug edit priority add comment and close it
description: A user opens a bug detail page, changes its priority, adds a comment, and closes the bug by setting its status to Closed.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Sign in with the demo account email demo@bugbox.dev and password demo1234
Click on the first bug title in the bug list to open its detail page
Verify the bug detail page shows the bug title, description, status badge, priority badge, and a comments section
Open the Priority dropdown in the update panel and select Critical
Click the Save changes button to update the priority
Type a comment into the comment textarea
Click the Post comment button
Verify the new comment appears in the comments section with the author name and a formatted timestamp
Open the Status dropdown in the update panel and select Closed
Click the Save changes button to close the bug
Verify the bug's status badge updates to Closed

name: Reopen a closed bug changes status back to open
description: A user opens a previously closed bug, changes its status back to Open, and verifies the bug is reopened in the list view.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Sign in with the demo account email demo@bugbox.dev and password demo1234
Open the Status filter dropdown and select Closed
Click the Apply button to filter for closed bugs
Verify at least one bug with a Closed status badge appears in the list
Click on a closed bug title to open its detail page
Verify the bug detail page shows the status badge as Closed
Open the Status dropdown in the update panel and select Open
Click the Save changes button to reopen the bug
Verify the bug's status badge on the detail page updates to Open
Navigate back to the homepage dashboard
Open the Status filter dropdown and select Open
Click the Apply button
Verify the reopened bug now appears in the Open-filtered bug list
